title: oSzoukaua's: XP is Bottles!
description: Mobs will now drop XP bottles that contain the exact amounts of XP the mob dropped!
body:
# Description: This pack makes all sources of xp orbs drop bottles of XP that corrolate directly to the XP orbs it would have dropped, For eample: if a Creeper drops 3 XP orbs with the values (1 , 3 , 7) it will now drop 3 bottles of XP with the values of (1 , 3 , 7) which will drop those exact orbs when thrown




## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
Discord @oSzoukaua
E-Mail Contact.oSzoukaua+Modrinth@gmail.com




Ko-Fi: ko-fi.com/oszoukaua Other: linktr.ee/oSzoukaua




## Technical details: This datapack executes on all XP orbs that dont have a specific tag, it kills the orb and takes the "value" of that xp orb, and encodes it into a custom potion colour, for a lingering potion that has the item_model of a Bottle o' Enchanting, when thrown #tick checks for area_effect_cloud entitys with the specific colours, then removes the cloud, and summons an XP orb with the specified "value" and a tag that prevents it from turning back into bottles
